name: 2026-06-04 Political Commentary Marines Testified Cameras Off TH
description:
Walang nakulong.

18 former Marines testified today. They said they delivered billions of pesos in cash from flood control projects.

The Senate of the Philippines did not broadcast the hearing.

The witnesses came. The country had a right to see. The cameras stayed off.

Walang nakulong.

18 former Marines testified today. They said they delivered billions of pesos in cash from flood control projects.

The Senate of the Philippines did not broadcast the hearing.

The witnesses came. The country had a right to see. The cameras stayed off.

Walang nakulong.

18 former Marines testified today. They said they delivered billions of pesos in cash from flood control projects.

The Senate of the Philippines did not broadcast the hearing.

The witnesses came. The country had a right to see. The cameras stayed off.

On 2026-06-04 the Cayetano-faction Senate proceeded with the Blue Ribbon hearing on the flood control corruption scandal despite Acting Senate President Gatchalian's prohibition. 18 former Marines who claimed direct involvement in delivering billions of pesos in cash from anomalous flood control projects appeared as resource persons. The Senate information bureau did not livestream the hearing. Sources: Manila Times, Inquirer, GMA, Sunstar, Philstar (June 4, 2026).
